# ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.invalid

**Case**

Item thumbnail request completed with invalid result.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalid
```

## Error Cases

- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item thumbnail request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.canceled**: Item thumbnail request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.notAvailable**: Item does not have thumbnail available.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.alreadyFetching**: Item thumbnail request is being serviced.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.canceled**: Item thumbnail request has been canceled.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code.notAvailable**: Item does not have thumbnail available.
